name: Canandaigua National Corporation
summary: Canandaigua National Corporation operates as the bank holding company for The Canandaigua National Bank and Trust Company that provides various banking and financial services. The company accepts checking accounts, savings bonds and accounts, certificates of deposit, government banking accounts, and money market accounts, as well as debit and credit cards. Its loan portfolio includes mortgages, automobile loans, recreational vehicle loans, personal/debt consolidation, home equity loans, home improvement loans, term loans, construction and renovation loans, letters of credit, lines of credit, and international trade products. The company also offers investment, financial planning, trust and estate, retirement, institutional, private banking, and family wealth services; and life, auto, home, business, general liability, property, long term care, and other insurance services. In addition, it offers overdraft protection services; cash management services; online, mobile, and text banking services; and bill pay, custodial, payroll, and workplace banking services. The company serves individuals, corporations, and municipalities in Ontario County and Monroe County of New York state. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Canandaigua, New York.
